problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
